channel.title: healthy-light-meals Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh healthy-light-meals posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Bright and Zesty Lemon Herb Grilled Salmon for Easy Weeknight Dinners
item.description: This lemon herb grilled salmon is a quick and healthy dinner that bursts with fresh, vibrant flavors. The lemony marinade with fragrant herbs keeps it light yet filling—ideal for any night you want something simple but special.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 salmon fillets, skin on, about 6 ounces each
  • 3 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh dill, chopped
  • 1 tablespoon fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1 teaspoon honey
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
  • Lemon wedges for serving

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #salmon #fresh #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Bright and Zesty Lemon Herb Grilled Salmon for Easy Weeknight Dinners
media:content.media:description: This lemon herb grilled salmon is a quick and healthy dinner that bursts with fresh, vibrant flavors. The lemony marinade with fragrant herbs keeps it light yet filling—ideal for any night you want something simple but special.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, salmon, fresh, olive

item.title: Light and Zesty Spring Quinoa Salad with Toasted Quinoa Flavor
item.description: This quinoa salad is fresh and bright, packed with crisp spring veggies and a lemony dressing. Toasting the quinoa first gives it a lovely nutty flavor. Great for a light lunch or side on warm days!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup quinoa, rinsed and drained
  • 1 3/4 cups water
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 cup cucumber, diced
  • 1/2 cup radishes, thinly sliced
  • 1/4 cup red onion, finely chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • Juice of 1 lemon
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #quinoa #water #cherry

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Light and Zesty Spring Quinoa Salad with Toasted Quinoa Flavor
media:content.media:description: This quinoa salad is fresh and bright, packed with crisp spring veggies and a lemony dressing. Toasting the quinoa first gives it a lovely nutty flavor. Great for a light lunch or side on warm days!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, quinoa, water, cherry

item.title: Refreshing Green Smoothie with Creamy Avocado and Kale Boost
item.description: This green smoothie is a creamy, nutrient-packed blend of avocado and kale that’s perfect for a quick detox. It’s super easy to make and great for mornings or after workouts.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 ripe avocado, peeled and pitted
  • 2 cups fresh kale leaves, stems removed
  • 1 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 1 medium banana, peeled
  • 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • 1/2 cup ice cubes

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #avocado #fresh #unsweetened

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Refreshing Green Smoothie with Creamy Avocado and Kale Boost
media:content.media:description: This green smoothie is a creamy, nutrient-packed blend of avocado and kale that’s perfect for a quick detox. It’s super easy to make and great for mornings or after workouts.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, avocado, fresh, unsweetened

item.title: Silky Spring Pea Soup with Fresh Mint for a Light, Comforting Lunch
item.description: This spring pea soup is so fresh and silky, brightened with mint for a little zing. It’s super quick to make and perfect for a light lunch or a cozy starter when you want something comforting but not heavy.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • 2 cups fresh or frozen peas
  • 3 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/2 cup fresh mint leaves, loosely packed
  • 1/4 cup heavy cream or coconut cream
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Juice of half a lemon

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #tablespoon #medium #fresh

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Silky Spring Pea Soup with Fresh Mint for a Light, Comforting Lunch
media:content.media:description: This spring pea soup is so fresh and silky, brightened with mint for a little zing. It’s super quick to make and perfect for a light lunch or a cozy starter when you want something comforting but not heavy.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, tablespoon, medium, fresh

item.title: Bright and Fresh Pea and Mint Soup Ready in 30 Minutes
item.description: This pea and mint soup is light and refreshing, perfect for a quick lunch or a spring starter. The fresh mint gives it a lovely twist, and it comes together in just half an hour—super easy and satisfying!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 tablespoon olive oil, cold-pressed
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 4 cups fresh or frozen peas
  • 3 cups vegetable broth, low sodium
  • 1/2 cup fresh mint leaves, packed
  • Salt to taste
  • Freshly ground black pepper to taste
  • 1/4 cup plain yogurt or crème fraîche (optional, for serving)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #tablespoon #medium #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Bright and Fresh Pea and Mint Soup Ready in 30 Minutes
media:content.media:description: This pea and mint soup is light and refreshing, perfect for a quick lunch or a spring starter. The fresh mint gives it a lovely twist, and it comes together in just half an hour—super easy and satisfying!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, tablespoon, medium, cloves

item.title: Fresh Herb Grilled Salmon Ready in 30 Minutes for Easy Dinners
item.description: This grilled salmon is loaded with bright spring herbs, making it fresh and flavorful. It cooks quickly in just 30 minutes, perfect for a healthy weeknight dinner. I love pairing it with simple sides for an effortless meal.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 salmon fillets, skin on, about 6 oz each
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • 2 tablespoons fresh dill, chopped
  • 1 tablespoon fresh chives, chopped
  • Salt and black pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #salmon #olive #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Herb Grilled Salmon Ready in 30 Minutes for Easy Dinners
media:content.media:description: This grilled salmon is loaded with bright spring herbs, making it fresh and flavorful. It cooks quickly in just 30 minutes, perfect for a healthy weeknight dinner. I love pairing it with simple sides for an effortless meal.

item.title: Fresh Zucchini Noodle Salad with Bright Lemon Dressing for Quick Lunches
item.description: This zucchini noodle salad is a refreshing, light dish that’s perfect when you want something crisp and easy. The zingy lemon dressing really wakes up the flavors, making it ideal for a quick lunch or a vibrant side.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 medium zucchinis, spiralized into noodles
  • 1/4 cup fresh lemon juice
  • 2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 2 tablespoons chopped fresh basil or parsley
  • 1/4 cup cherry tomatoes, halved (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #medium #fresh #extra

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Zucchini Noodle Salad with Bright Lemon Dressing for Quick Lunches
media:content.media:description: This zucchini noodle salad is a refreshing, light dish that’s perfect when you want something crisp and easy. The zingy lemon dressing really wakes up the flavors, making it ideal for a quick lunch or a vibrant side.
